title: The maglev-pretenure-store-values feature leads to bypass of write barrier check
bounty_rationale: high-quality report of memory corruption in a sandboxed process / renderer
description_snippet:
-------------------------

VULNERABILITY DETAILS

This vulnerability is essentially a UAF issue caused by the absence of a write barrier. I have reported similar issues before, and subsequently V8 uniformly used `CanElideWriteBarrier()` to check whether the write barrier can be eliminated. However,
